title: StudioBrain Template Pack Schema
description: JSON Schema for pack.json files under templates/Packs/<pack-id>/. A pack groups templates, rules, layouts, and example entities into an installable unit. Meta-packs reference other packs via 'includes' rather than embedding content.

id.description: Unique pack identifier; must match the pack directory name. snake_case or kebab-case.

name.description: Human-readable pack name shown in the marketplace and installer UI.

description.description: Free-form description shown in the marketplace listing.

compat.description: Compatibility metadata. min_core_version is required so the installer can refuse packs targeting a newer core than is running.

entity_types.description: Entity types this pack provides content for. Informational; not strictly enforced against contents.

icon.description: Path to an icon asset relative to the pack root, or null.

is_default.description: When true, the pack is installed automatically on new projects.

auto_install.description: When true, the pack is queued for install on first run.

is_meta_pack.description: When true, the pack only references other packs via 'includes' and carries no direct content.

includes.description: List of pack ids that this meta-pack aggregates. Empty for non-meta packs.

templates.description: Template markdown files (paths relative to the pack root). Empty for meta-packs.

rules.description: Rule files (paths relative to the pack root). Empty for meta-packs.

layouts.description: Layout JSON files (paths relative to the pack root). Empty for meta-packs.

examples.description: Example entity markdown files (paths relative to the pack root).

skills.description: Skill YAML files (paths relative to the pack root).

plugins.description: Plugin directories (names relative to plugins/) bundled by the pack.

then.description: Meta-packs must declare at least one include; should not carry direct templates.
